title: Light Tools
description: diamond tools upgraded with gold, with the bonus addition of a lightning sword and lightning bolt
body: In this mod light tools can be crafted using diamond tools and upgrading them with gold. It contains a sword,axe,pickaxe,hoe and shovel. You can obtain 2 very strong unique tools, the lightning sword which strikes mobs with lightning and the lightning bolt which is a projectile that strikes lightning to mobs. Also the enchantment exists as it's own version and can be equiped to any item, however, lighting will strike only 50% of the time.This is a standalone version from the tools that already exist in my other mod called minecraft expansion i just thought maybe some people will want just the light tools.
